titleEn: ManureCreate a comfortable environment conducive to cow health
titleZh: 智能清粪机器人助力奶牛健康与牧场循环农业
summaryZh: 本文介绍了Lely公司针对奶牛场的智能清粪解决方案，包括Discovery Collector和Discovery Scraper两款自主导航机器人，以及Lely Sphere循环粪肥处理系统。机器人可全天候自动清理牛舍地面，减少人工劳动，改善蹄部、尾部及乳房卫生，降低感染风险。Sphere系统则将粪便转化为三种液态循环肥料，实现矿物质闭环利用。文章还分析了当前牧场面临的劳动力短缺、传统清粪维护成本高等痛点，突出自动化与循环农业的实践价值。
featuredReason: 该新闻聚焦奶牛场自动化清粪与循环农业技术，直接对应智慧畜牧中机器人、传感器和闭环养分管理的核心应用，对提升牛群健康、降低人工成本及实现可持续养殖具有高实践参考价值。
contentFull: Solutions overviewSolutionsManureReduced labor effortImprove herd healthFlexibility in all barnsDiscover our manure robotsExploreintroductionRobotic cleaning for a hygienic barnOur manure solutions maintain barn hygiene and create a comfortable environment contributing to an optimal cow health. Our solutions also help creating a pleasant working environment and reduce time consuming, repetitive labor, allowing you to devote your time to cow care.PropositionsBarn cleaning Efficient barn cleaning is essential for maintaining animal health and farm productivity. Our robotic cleaning solutions ensure consistent and thorough removal of manure, reducing labor effort and contributing to an optimal cow health. The Discovery Scraper and Discovery Collector are compact and navigate autonomously, making them easy to integrate into your existing barn layout and able to reach almost all areas of the barn.Valorising emissions Our circular barn system Lely Sphere valorizes nitrogen emissions by converting them into a liquid, circular fertilizer. The system also separates the urine with potassium and the faeces with organic nitrogen and phosphate. These three types of fertilizers can each be used for optimal fertilisation of soil and crops, exactly where and when needed. This improves closing the mineral cycles on the farm.Robotic solutions for a clean barn floorReduced labour effortThe Discovery manure robots work day and night to keep the barn floor clean, taking a dirty, time-consuming, and repetitive task out of your hands.Herd healthA regularly cleaned barn floor contributes to cleaner hooves, tails and cubicles, which results in cleaner udders, helping to reduce infections and supporting the natural behavior of cows. Flexibility in all barnsLely Discovery manure robots require no cables or gutters, are compact and use sensors to navigate autonomously, enabling them to navigate easily under sorting gates, in cross alleys and in the waiting area in front of the milking robot and making them easy to integrate in the barn. Manure products overviewManure robot for (semi) dense barn floorsLely Discovery Collectormanure robot for slatted barn floorsLely Discovery ScraperCircular manure-handling systemLely SphereVideoHow does the Collector work?More about the Discovery CollectorArticlesFarming insightsCow Health2/12/2026Why farmers choose the Lely Discovery CollectorWhen it comes to barn hygiene, many farmers recognise one or more of the following challenges in their daily work on modern dairy farms worldwide today: Labour shortages and succession planning. Skilled staff are hard to find, and automation offers a more sustainable solution. High maintenance demands. Conventional systems require regular rope changes and repairs, which cost time and money. Deep bedding challenges. Working with sand or other bedding materials adds complexity to daily routines. Limited cleaning with traditional scrapers. Corners and narrow areas are often missed, reducing overall hygiene. The Lely Discovery Collector is designed to solve these challenges. Built for barns where traditional systems struggle, it combines robust engineering with intelligent operation to clean almost every corner, day and night. For farmers aiming for consistent barn hygiene, healthier cows, and less manual work, the Discovery Collector is a practical choice.Manure2/12/2026The first solution for dense barn floors: the Lely Discovery CollectorKeeping your barn clean is essential for cow health, milk quality, and overall farm efficiency. But what if your barn has dense floors, sand bedding, or irregular layouts? Traditional scraping systems often struggle in these conditions. That’s why Lely developed the Discovery Collector, the first manure robot designed specifically for dense barn floors. This innovative solution combines robust engineering, intelligent operation, and proven reliability to deliver consistent cleaning in even the most demanding environments. It’s not just a manure collector, it’s a smarter way to supporting barn hygiene and cow comfort, contributing to cleaner conditions in all areas of the barn.Manure2/12/2026Why reliability and adaptability matter in automatic manure cleaningIf you’re considering automatic manure cleaning, two questions usually come first: “Will it work in my barn?” and “Will it keep working?” The Lely Discovery Scraper is built to answer both. With proven technology, robust design, and exceptional fit across different barn layouts, it’s a safe, smart step towards cleaner floors, healthier cows, and a more efficient routine.Manure2/12/2026The Lely Discovery Scraper: simplicity for cleaner barnsMore than 20 years ago, Lely introduced its first manure robot the Discovery Scraper and changed the way farmers think about barn hygiene. Today, with over 23,000 units operating worldwide, this solution remains one of the most trusted and proven technologies in dairy farming. But why do some farmers still hesitate? Let’s tackle the misconceptions and show why the Discovery Scraper is the smart choice for modern barns.Manure2/12/2026Why Lely automatic manure cleaning is the next step for your farmKeeping barns clean is essential for cow health, milk quality, and overall farm efficiency. Yet, many farmers still rely on conventional scraping systems, and that comes with challenges. Labour shortages and succession planning make manual scraping harder to sustain. Maintenance headaches like rope changes and repairs cost time and money. Deep bedding stress adds complexity, and traditional scrapers often leave corners and tight spaces dirty, compromising hygiene. These issues aren’t just frustrating, they impact cow comfort, hoof health, and ultimately your bottom line. The good news? Proven Lely automatic cleaning solutions can help farmers take the next step. Automation? Yes. Reliable? Yes. Robust? Yes. Local support? Absolutely.Manure1/22/2026From tradition to innovation: Why automatic manure cleaning is the next logical stepTradition has shaped dairy farming for generations, and conventional manure cleaning methods have played a reliable role in that journey. Today, farmers are facing increasing pressure from labour availability, rising costs, and higher hygiene expectations, making it more challenging to continue working in the same way. Automation isn’t about replacing tradition; it’s about building on it. Here’s why automatic manure cleaning is the natural next step for modern farms. Frequently asked questionsFrequently asked questions about manure solutionsWhat is a robotic barn cleaning system?A robotic barn cleaning system is an automated solution that is designed to continuously remove manure from barn floors. By keeping floors cleaner and drier throughout the day, it supports cow comfort, hoof health, and overall barn hygiene. Unlike manual cleaning or fixed cleaning moments, robotic systems operate autonomously and consistently, which helps create a more stable barn environment. Automation also reduces reliance on manual labour, saves time, and supports efficient daily operations, especially when labour availability becomes more challenging. How does automatic manure cleaning work?Automatic manure cleaning works by using autonomous systems that clean barn floors at frequent intervals throughout the day. These systems move independently through the barn, removing manure and helping to keep floors consistently clean and dry. Lely automatic manure cleaning solutions are designed with a cow‑focused approach. They operate quietly, follow predictable routes, and fit different barn layouts and management styles without disrupting the cows’ daily routine. By automating this repetitive task, farmers can reduce daily labour while supporting smooth farm operations and consistent barn hygiene. What is the difference between Lely Discovery Collector and the Discovery Scraper?Lely offers two proven solutions for automatic manure cleaning, with more than 30,000 machines in use worldwide. The Discovery Scraper, introduced in 2005, is designed for slatted floors and automatically removes manure by scraping it through the slatted floors, helping to keep floors cleaner and drier throughout the day. For closed barn floors, Lely invented the Discovery Collector, which was commercially introduced in 2016. This mobile, manure‑collecting robot vacuums manure and transports it to a dump station, offering flexibility and consistent cleaning with minimal barn adjustments. How do manure scraper robots handle tight spaces in the barn?Manure scraper robots operate autonomously using sensors and predefined routes to navigate through the barn while cleaning floors consistently. Solutions like the Discovery Scraper and Collector are designed to work in tight spaces, allowing them to move easily under sorting gates, and between cows. They reach practically every corner of the barn. This ensures thorough cleaning across the entire barn, including hard-to-reach areas, without disrupting daily farm routines. How does the Lely Sphere system manage nitrogen emissions?The Lely Sphere system manages nitrogen emissions by separating urine and feces as quickly as possible and capturing ammonia directly at the source, under the barn floor. The system converts the captured ammonia into a liquid nitrogen fertiliser, which can be reused on the farm. Learn all about the Lely Sphere on our webpage.ResourcesBrochuresBrochureSphereDownload the Sphere brochureDownloadBrochureDiscovery CollectorDownload the Discovery Collector brochureDownloadWhy our solutions?Our solutions contribute to more than just high-quality milk. They offer freedom of choice and flexibility and contribute to the well-being of you and your cows. From machines to software and new innovations, we have many options. Contact one of our Lely Centers for advice.Get free advice
translationZh:
解决方案概述

解决方案

**粪便管理**
减少劳动力投入
改善牛群健康
适用于所有牛舍的灵活性
探索我们的清粪机器人

**介绍**

用于卫生牛舍的机器人清洁

我们的粪便管理解决方案可维持牛舍卫生，并营造一个有助于奶牛达到最佳健康状态的舒适环境。我们的解决方案还有助于创造宜人的工作环境，减少耗时且重复的劳动，让您能够将时间投入到奶牛护理上。

**主张**

**牛舍清洁**
高效的牛舍清洁对于维持动物健康和生产效率至关重要。我们的机器人清洁解决方案确保持续、彻底地清除粪便，减少劳动力投入，并有助于奶牛达到最佳健康状态。Discovery Scraper和Discovery Collector体积紧凑，可自主导航，易于集成到现有牛舍布局中，并能到达牛舍几乎所有区域。

**排放物资源化**
我们的循环牛舍系统Lely Sphere通过将氮排放转化为液态循环肥料，实现其资源化利用。该系统还将富含钾的尿液与富含有机氮和磷酸盐的粪便分离。这三种肥料均可用于土壤和作物的最佳施肥，精准满足时间和地点需求。这有助于在农场内实现矿物质循环的闭合。

**用于清洁牛舍地面的机器人解决方案**

**减少劳动力投入**
Discovery清粪机器人昼夜不停地保持牛舍地面清洁，将一项肮脏、耗时且重复的任务从您手中解放出来。

**牛群健康**
定期清洁的牛舍地面有助于保持蹄部、尾巴和卧床的清洁，进而使乳房更洁净，有助于减少感染，并支持奶牛的自然行为。

**适用于所有牛舍的灵活性**
Lely Discovery清粪机器人无需电缆或排水沟，体积紧凑，利用传感器自主导航，能够轻松在分群门下方、横向通道以及挤奶机器人前的等待区穿行，易于集成到牛舍中。

**粪便产品概览**

用于（半）密实牛舍地面的清粪机器人：Lely Discovery Collector
用于漏缝牛舍地面的清粪机器人：Lely Discovery Scraper
循环粪便处理系统：Lely Sphere

**视频**
Collector如何工作？
更多关于Discovery Collector的信息

**文章**

**养殖洞察**

**奶牛健康**
2026年2月12日

**为什么农民选择Lely Discovery Collector**

在牛舍卫生方面，当今全球现代化奶牛场的日常工作中，许多农民都认识到以下一个或多个挑战：劳动力短缺与继任规划。熟练员工难以找到，自动化提供了更可持续的解决方案。高维护需求。传统系统需要定期更换绳索和维修，耗费时间和金钱。深垫料挑战。使用沙子或其他垫料材料增加了日常工作的复杂性。传统刮粪板清洁范围有限。角落和狭窄区域常常被遗漏，降低了整体卫生水平。
